mnemonics.title: Comment Types Quick Reference
mnemonics.content:
Single: // (2 characters, like 2 eyes watching)
Multi: /* */ (asterisks like stars)
Docs: /** */ (extra star for documentation)

mnemonics.title: Javadoc Tags Memory Aid
mnemonics.content:
Javadoc tags rhyme: 'Param, Return, Throws, Author, Version, See, Since, Deprecated'
P-R-T-A-V-S-D: Please Read The Author's Version Should Be Deprecated

acronyms.usage: Tool for generating API documentation from source code comments
Documentation generated via Javadoc describes the API of classes and methods

visualTips.visualization: Draw three boxes: // (small, 1 line) → /* */ (medium, multiple lines) → /** */ (large, with tags)
Place tags in order: @author, @version, @param (for each param), @return, @throws, @see, @since, @deprecated

analogies.analogy: Comments are like footnotes in a textbook - they explain and clarify without changing the main content
Javadoc is like a user manual automatically generated from the product itself
